# BTC Cowen ATC

BTC Cowen ATC is an interactive Bitcoin price model chart and methodology companion for Benjamin Cowen's working paper "Asymmetric Tail Curvature in Bitcoin Price Quantiles."

## Canonical pages

- Dashboard: https://catc.zyhe.me/
- Methodology and caveats: https://catc.zyhe.me/about/
- Data snapshot: https://catc.zyhe.me/data/btc-atc.json
- XML sitemap: https://catc.zyhe.me/sitemap.xml
- Source paper: https://benjamincowen.com/reports/asymmetric-tail-curvature-in-bitcoin-price-quantiles

## What the site is

- A visual interface for Bitcoin asymmetric tail curvature quantile bands.
- A BTC/USD daily close chart with Cowen paper coefficients and comparison model modes.
- A research and education companion for long-run Bitcoin price structure.
- A descriptive model view with explicit projection caveats.

## What the site is not

- It is not investment advice.
- It is not a trading signal.
- It is not a guaranteed Bitcoin floor, target, or price forecast.
- It is not a portfolio risk or return-tail probability model.

## Structured metadata

- The HTML pages include JSON-LD for WebSite, WebApplication, WebPage, BreadcrumbList, and Dataset.
- The dataset JSON is the canonical machine-readable BTC/USD snapshot for this site.
- The social preview image is https://catc.zyhe.me/social-preview.png.

## Useful phrases

- Bitcoin ATC quantile model
- BTC price model chart
- Cowen asymmetric tail curvature
- Bitcoin quantile bands
- BTC/USD projection caveats
